# Per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-03-phase-ab-pipeline-upgrade-design.md §5,
# 10 tracks in this order. One YouTube URL per line, blank lines and # ignored.
#
# The pipeline derives a slug from the mp3 filename — run analyze once to see it,
# then name the label file labels/<slug>.json accordingly.

# Slot 1: JVKE — golden hour (official music video) (lush sustained piano — explicit failure case)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PEM0Vs8jf1w

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YYlSa4M2zzM

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_0Pf48RqSsg

# Slot 4: Bach — Orchestral Suite No.3 in D Major: II. Air on a G-String (arr. cello quintet)
# Instrumental, tests drum gate; YT ID from existing cache dir: …ing6btc4s0a
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ing6BtC4S0A

# Preferred over the "Heads On The Radio" upload already in cache; use canonical official upload
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XFkzRNyygfk

# Slot 6: Johann Strauss II — The Blue Danube (Wiener Symphoniker, Live from Vienna 2025)
# Waltz / 3/4 — clear time-signature != 4/4 test; reputable orchestra upload
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CZ-p_CXDlu0

# Slot 7: Beyoncé — Love On Top (Official Video)
# Modulates upward 4 times in final section — canonical key-change test
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vzzq4XQinb4

# Slot 8: Beach House — Space Song (Official Music Video)
# Heavy reverb / dream-pop production; from Depression Cherry (2015)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RBtlPT23PTM

# Slot 9: Daniel Johnston — True Love Will Find You In The End (Official Music Video)
# Lo-fi / 4-track hiss; canonical lo-fi example from 1990 cassette recordings
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R-LMgGZUdGQ

# Slot 10: Kendrick Lamar — HUMBLE. (Official Music Video)
# Rap track — F0 should produce fewer notes than basic-pitch (opposite of sustained-vocals expectation)
